prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `9ddd00f0`.
codex_response:
Implemented `9ddd00f0` as a new ARC2 task package. The rule is: infer `n` from the square grid size `n^2 + n - 1`, then reconstruct the full `n x n` lattice of `n x n` foreground blocks separated by 1-cell zero lines, where block `(r, c)` has a single zero at in-block coordinate `(r, c)`. I discarded the Sonnet hint because it described section reflection instead of block completion; the Opus hint matched the official puzzle, and that correction is documented in notes. No new shared primitive was needed.

Validation passed end to end: `3/3` official examples matched, the shared builder produced 1000 generated examples and preview sheets, and generated-example verification passed `1000/1000`. I also sanity-checked generated samples plus a preview thumbnail; the generator stays in-family by sampling sparse connected macro-block subsets and restoring the full canonical lattice.

Task package: [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_9ddd00f0/__init__.py), [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_9ddd00f0/verifier.py), [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_9ddd00f0/generator.py), [notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_9ddd00f0/notes.md). Artifacts: [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/9ddd00f0/task.json), [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/9ddd00f0/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/9ddd00f0/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/9ddd00f0/previews/preview_02.png), [preview_03.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/9ddd00f0/previews/preview_03.png).
